span.p:
EVENT
Upload Event
New notable file lands in incoming/

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OBJECT
Input object stored
Raw notable content (json/text)

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OUTPUT
Output bucket (optional)
Stores generated report for review

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
TRIGGER
Triggered by S3 event
Receives bucket + key

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
NORMALIZE
Normalize & extract key fields
Summary + risk context + raw event data

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PREPARE
Prepare analysis input
Consistent, evidence-focused format

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
REPORT
Generate analyst-ready report
Findings, evidence, suggested next steps

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PACKAGE
Assemble final analysis package
Report + structured results + metadata

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ERROR
Error handling
Log + record processing failure

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
ANALYZE
LLM analysis
Map alert to likely MITRE ATT&CK techniques
Return structured results

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
HEC
Splunk HEC
Ingest analysis as a new event

div.style: color: rgb(230, 237, 243) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
REST
Splunk REST Notable Update
Attach report to the existing notable
